/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/adaptive-red-tests.dir/adaptive-red-tests.cc.o" -o /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/src/traffic-control/examples/ns3.37-adaptive-red-tests-default  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.13/Frameworks -Wl,-rpath,/Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-point-to-point-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-applications-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-flow-monitor-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-internet-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-traffic-control-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-bridge-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-network-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-stats-default.dylib /Users/nnn/ns3/ns-3.37/build/lib/libns3.37-core-default.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgsl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgslcblas.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
